name: bounded Go agent action readiness audit activates

input.request: Assess whether an agent may make a bounded local edit, run focused tests, create a commit, and open a draft pull request in this Go repository. Inspect only repository instructions, commit and pre-commit hooks, required CI checks, branch permissions, and wrappers enforcing those actions. Use no more than two subagents for disjoint control-plane slices. Stay read-only and return the strict report.
input.context: Do not audit application correctness, general security, supply chain, deployment, or production readiness. Record service-dependent checks as NOT_RUN or GATED.

expected_behavior: establish an immutable audit baseline and bounded scope
delegate no more than two disjoint control-plane workstreams when parallel review is justified
use controlled evidence classifications and evidence IDs
distinguish tool presence from executed blocking enforcement
produce the strict audit-report-template structure without deleting required sections
derive autonomy from explicit fail-closed gates rather than an unsupported score
record skipped commands, unknown controls, residual risk, and human approval boundaries
